name: Lemonade Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully remove zest from two of the lemons.
2. Combine water, sugar and lemon zest in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer together for 10 minutes.
4. Cool to room temperature.
5. Meanwhile juice the six lemons (you should have about 1 cup of juice).
6. Add the fresh lemon juice to the cooled syrup mixture.
7. Strain into a covered jar and stir before using.
To serve:
Put two tablespoons of syrup in a glass, add ice cubes and fill with cold water. Stir well.
